changeSet.author: storage-hierarchy-update
changeSet.comment: Add 'room' as a valid location type to support room-level storage assignment. Some laboratories need to assign samples directly to room level when specific storage equipment (device/shelf/rack/box) is not required or not available. This completes the full storage hierarchy support: room > device > shelf > rack > box. Updates constraints on both sample_storage_assignment and sample_storage_movement tables.
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE clinlims.sample_storage_assignment DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS chk_location_type_valid;
ALTER TABLE clinlims.sample_storage_movement DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS chk_new_location_type_valid;
ALTER TABLE clinlims.sample_storage_movement DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS chk_previous_location_type_valid;
ALTER TABLE clinlims.sample_storage_movement DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS chk_movement_has_location;

ALTER TABLE clinlims.sample_storage_movement ADD CONSTRAINT chk_movement_has_location CHECK ( (previous_location_id IS NOT NULL AND previous_location_type IS NOT NULL) OR (new_location_id IS NOT NULL AND new_location_type IS NOT NULL) OR (new_location_type = 'general') OR (new_location_type = 'room') );

rollback.sql: ALTER TABLE clinlims.sample_storage_assignment DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS chk_location_type_valid;
ALTER TABLE clinlims.sample_storage_movement DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS chk_new_location_type_valid;
ALTER TABLE clinlims.sample_storage_movement DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS chk_previous_location_type_valid;
ALTER TABLE clinlims.sample_storage_movement DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS chk_movement_has_location;

ALTER TABLE clinlims.sample_storage_movement ADD CONSTRAINT chk_movement_has_location CHECK ( (previous_location_id IS NOT NULL AND previous_location_type IS NOT NULL) OR (new_location_id IS NOT NULL AND new_location_type IS NOT NULL) OR (new_location_type = 'general') );
